results.title: Trump expected to nominate Todd Blanche as attorney general: Reports
results.description: At a House hearing, Marco Rubio showed frustration as Democrats criticized him without allowing responses.

results.title: Planning to expand base, will contest all 117 seats: Punjab Jagao Morcha
results.description: The Punjab Jagao Morcha on Wednesday held a coordination meeting here and announced plans to strengthen its organisational network across the state while preparing to contest all 117 Assembly seats in the state. Leaders of the morcha, formed around a month ago by nine regional political and social organisations, said they would focus on issues [...]

results.title: Centre nod not must for early release if jail term under union law was served: Madras HC
results.description: Having completed more than 21 years in prison, he submitted an application to the home secretary seeking premature release but it was rejected.
